quotes.verbatim_quote:
In the examples to follow we will employ a variety of chord cycles that can be forced
against the original cycles, using fragments of the same songs illustrated in lesson 7,
along with a few others. In each example, you have the song fragments as they would
appear in sheet music along with two variations.
quotes.why_load_bearing: Defines the pedagogical method of the entire chapter — substituting forced chord cycles against original cycles — and explains the two-variation format used throughout.

quotes.verbatim_quote: Master them all, commit them to memory and use only those which you like the best.
quotes.why_load_bearing: This is the chapter's explicit practice directive, instructing students to internalize all variations before exercising personal taste in selection.
